title: Kuwait Air Force Is Latest Military Aircraft Spott

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: A Boeing C-17A Globemaster III from the Middle East country departed South Ayrshire (Image: Martin Clarke) A Boeing C-17A Globemaster III from the Middle East country departed South Ayrshire for Dover Air Force Base in the US on Monday, March 9. The aircraft, in a distinctive livery featuring the colours of the Kuwait flag, was delivered to the air force in September 2010.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: The C-17 commonly performs tactical and strategic airlift missions, transporting troops and cargo throughout the world, alongside medical evacuation and airdrop duties. The aircraft is in service with the US Air Force along with the air forces of India, the United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates and Kuwait.
